articles.title: Jarren Duran’s 3-run homer brings life back into outfielder, Red Sox
articles.description:
Duran was just looking for an RBI when he stepped into the batter's box in the third inning. But the home run was a welcome sight.

The post Jarren Duran’s 3-run homer brings life back into outfielder, Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
